name: TiumBio Co., Ltd.
summary: TiumBio Co., Ltd., a drug discovery company, researches and develops therapeutics for patients with unaddressedrare diseases. The company's products pipeline include chemical entity-based drugs and biopharmaceuticals comprising NCE401, NCE403, NCE406, NCE604, NCE611, and NBP. TiumBio Co., Ltd. is based in Seongnam-si, South Korea.
